subcodes.first_line: O beloved handmaiden of God! Thy letter was received. The trace of its pen was indeed like purest musk, for the flowers of meaning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه رسید اثر خامه فی الحقیقه مشک اذفر بود زیرا گلهای معانی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
